name: CompToolBench
description: CompToolBench is a controlled benchmark for evaluating compositional tool-use capabilities in large language models. It comprises 200 tasks across 106 deterministic tools at four DAG-based composition levels (L0: single call, L1: sequential chain, L2: parallel fork-join, L3: complex DAG), enabling systematic measurement of the Selection Gap — the finding that single-tool selection from a realistic catalog is harder than multi-tool composition.
citation: Rahman, M. A. (2026). CompToolBench: Measuring the Compositional Tool-Use Gap in Large Language Models. Working Paper, Texas Tech University.

distribution.name: huggingface-repository
distribution.description: The HuggingFace dataset repository hosting CompToolBench.

distribution.name: task_suite.json
distribution.description: The complete 200-task evaluation suite with ground-truth expected traces, tool schemas, and metadata.

recordSet.name: tasks
recordSet.description: Each record represents one evaluation task in the CompToolBench benchmark. Tasks are organized across four composition levels (L0–L3) with increasing structural complexity.

field.name: task_id
field.description: Unique identifier for the task, encoding the composition level and index (e.g., L0_node_0001, L1_chain_0049, L2_parallel_0116, L3_dag_0177).

field.name: level
field.description: Composition level: 0 (single call), 1 (sequential chain), 2 (parallel fork-join), or 3 (complex DAG).

field.name: prompt
field.description: Natural-language task description presented to the model. L0 prompts are deliberately minimal; L1–L3 prompts describe multi-step workflows.

field.name: available_tools
field.description: JSON array of tool schemas (OpenAI function-calling format) available for this task, including the correct tool(s) and distractors from the 106-tool catalog.

field.name: expected_trace
field.description: Ground-truth sequence of tool calls with expected arguments and outputs, encoded as a JSON array. Defines the correct DAG execution order.

field.name: metadata
field.description: Task metadata including DAG structure, number of steps, category tags, and generation parameters (seed, engine version).

rai:dataCollection: All 200 tasks are synthetically generated by the deterministic CompositionEngine (seed 42). No human data, personal information, or web-scraped content is included. The 106 tool schemas are author-designed with realistic parameter types.
rai:dataBiases: Tasks are English-only and reflect common software utility patterns (weather, text processing, calculation). The tool catalog may not represent domain-specific or culturally diverse tool ecosystems.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: None. All data is synthetic. No personal, biometric, or sensitive information is present in any task or tool output.
